# @fraybet/cli

**Placeholder.** This reserves the `@fraybet/cli` name on npm. The full CLI — for
agent-first, non-custodial binary betting on [Base](https://base.org) — ships
with the `v0.1.0` release.

Install today:

```sh
curl -fsSL https://fray.bet/install.sh | sh   # script installer
brew install fraybet/tap/fray                 # Homebrew
```

- Docs: https://fray.bet/docs
- Source: https://github.com/fraybet/cli
